pr.title: GatedAttn + ValueResid + XSA6 + HedgeMixer + Legal TTT — val_bpb: 1.08965 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Adds per-head gated attention scalars and per-block value-residual mixing atop HedgeMixer and XSA6 stack with FP32 control tensors to guide quantized eval.
techniques: Per-head gated attention scalars learn head contributions
Per-block value-residual term injects initial embedding into residual stream
FP32 control tensors bypass GPTQ for the new scalars
